description_long: This is a three-tiered round cake with vibrant blue icing covering each layer and red sponge cake visible between the tiers. The cake is decorated with eight striped candles, each topped with a small orange flame, evenly spaced around the two lower tiers. On the topmost tier, there are two large number candles forming the number '10', with white faces and red outlines. The top surface of the cake features a white circular emblem with a geometric blue design. The icing appears smooth and slightly glossy, with white piped borders accentuating the edges of each tier. The cake sits directly on a flat surface with no visible plate or stand.
description: A three-tiered blue-iced cake with red sponge layers, eight striped candles, and large '10' number candles on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three tiers, the '10' number candles, and all eight striped candles with flames.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the tiers and the profile of the '10' candles, with six candles visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the reversed '10' candles and the arrangement of the candles around the cake.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the '10' candles seen from the side and six candles visible.
